stage1_output.Text: Use the methods defined in requirement A3.4 to conduct evaluations.
Document the pre-release results of the evaluations.
Determine and document how often ongoing evaluation should be conducted to continue supporting this Goal.

Provide documentation to customers which describes the system's: 1) intended uses, Provide documentation to customers which describes the system's: 2) evidence that the system is fit for purpose for each intended use.
When the system is a platform service made available to external customers or partners, include this information in the required Transparency Note.
